# Skin 360 Face Body Scalp

> A boutique face, body, and scalp esthetics clinic with two Southern California locations (Toluca Lake/Burbank and Valencia). Founded and led by esthetician Carolina, Skin 360 offers personalized facials, advanced skin treatments, non-invasive body contouring, Brazilian lymphatic drainage, a signature Japanese Head Spa, nails, and post-cosmetic surgery recovery care — combining premium products with state-of-the-art technology to boost self-esteem and inspire lasting confidence.

## Key facts
- Business name: Skin 360 Face Body Scalp
- Founder / lead esthetician: Carolina
- Locations: Toluca Lake (4425 W. Riverside Drive, Suite 203, Burbank, CA 91505) and Valencia (Santa Clarita area)
- Phone: (818) 601-2852 · Valencia: (661) 812-6999
- Email: skin360facebodyscalp@yahoo.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 10:00 AM–6:00 PM; Saturday 9:00 AM–4:00 PM; Sunday closed
- Book online: Toluca Lake via GlossGenius (https://skin360facebodyscalp.glossgenius.com/); Valencia via Square. Choose a location at https://skin360facebodyscalp.com/book
- Website: https://skin360facebodyscalp.com
- Service areas: Toluca Lake, Burbank, Valencia, Santa Clarita, Los Angeles

## Services

### Face — facials & advanced skin treatments (https://skin360facebodyscalp.com/services/face)
- Classic Facial — $145 (55 min)
- Signature Customized Facial — $295 (90 min)
- Cleopatra 24K Gold Facial — $250 (85 min)
- Skin Zero Gravity Face Treatment — $450 (75 min); non-invasive microcurrent/electroporation alternative to Botox
- Facial Skin Workouts Treatment — $250 (45 min)
- Diamond Elite Facial — $275 (80 min; HydroDermabrasion + LED light therapy)
- DMK Skin Revision Enzyme Therapy — $245 (90 min)
- DMK Skin Revision Muscle Banding — $285 (100 min)
- DMK Skin Revision Stemzyme Bootcamp — $1,595 (50-day, 5-treatment program; $500 deposit)
- Procell Microchannel Therapy — $350 (80 min)
- TCA Chemical Peel — from $200 (free consultation)
- Jet Plasma Pen — $1,950 (4-treatment program)
- Add-ons: BioRePeel Blue $95, Collagen Hand Mask $30, Dermaplaning $75, Hydrocell Neck Treatment $30, Manual Lymphatic Massage $75, Silver Repairing Microcurrent Mask $90

### Body — contouring & lymphatic drainage (https://skin360facebodyscalp.com/services/body)
- Brazilian Lymphatic Drainage — $195 (55 min)
- Brazilian Lymphatic Drainage, Body/Face — $245 (75 min)
- Brazilian Lymphatic Drainage with Cavitation — $295 (80 min)
- Brazilian Lymphatic Drainage with Radio Frequency — $295 (80 min)
- Delfín Sculpting Therapy (per area: stomach, arms, legs, butt-lift) — $175 (35 min)
- Lymphatic Drainage with Delfín Therapy Cupping — $250 (60 min)
- Orbix Micro-Vibration Sculpting — $275 (60 min)
- Body Skin Workout — $250 (40 min)
- Jet Plasma Pen — $2,400 (4-treatment program)
- Add-on: BioRePeel Gold $115 per area

### Scalp — Japanese Head Spa (https://skin360facebodyscalp.com/services/scalp)
- Japanese Signature Scalp Treatment — $160 (60 min)
- Japanese Detox Scalp Treatment — $210 (75 min)
- Skin 360 Luxury Scalp Experience — $275 (90 min)
- Japanese Gentleman Scalp Treatment — $185 (60 min)
- Hair Extension Tailored Japanese Headspa — $255 (90 min)
- Hair loss add-ons: Red Laser Scalp Therapy $125, Healthy Scalp & Fight Hair Loss Treatment $190
- Hair add-ons: Blow Dry & Style $60, Blow Dry with Hot Tool $75, Hair Extension move-up/install/removal from $50

### Nails (https://skin360facebodyscalp.com/services/nails)
- Classic Manicure or Pedicure — $30
- Gel Manicure or Pedicure — $40
- Russian Manicure or Pedicure — $70
- Full Nail Set — $75; Nail Fills — $60
- Combos: Classic Mani/Pedi $125, Gel Mani/Pedi $148, Russian Mani/Pedi $185
- Add-ons: Paraffin Wax $12, Scrub $10, Callus Remover $12, 10-Min Massage $15, Nail Design from $3/nail, French Tip $10

### Post-Cosmetic Surgery — recovery lymphatic drainage (https://skin360facebodyscalp.com/services/post-cosmetic-surgery)
- Post Cosmetic Surgery Body — $215 (60 min)
- Post Cosmetic Surgery Face — $170 (45 min)
- Post Cosmetic Surgery Body/Face — $345 (100 min)
- Packages: 15% off a series of 10 sessions

## Policies
- Cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance.
- Cancellations under 24 hours: 50% fee. No-shows: 100% charge.
- Arriving more than 10–15 minutes late may require rescheduling.

## Booking
Each location books through its own platform: Toluca Lake via GlossGenius (https://skin360facebodyscalp.glossgenius.com/) and Valencia via Square. Start at https://skin360facebodyscalp.com/book to choose a location.
